channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Hacker News] Learning the Integral of a Diffusion Model
item.description: Learning the Integral of a Diffusion Model

item.title: [Hacker News] Show HN: I built an open-source email builder, alternative to Beefree/Unlayer
item.description: Show HN: I built an open-source email builder, alternative to Beefree/Unlayer

item.title: [Hacker News] Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX
item.description: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX

item.title: [Anthropic] Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX
item.description: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX

item.title: [Hacker News] Show HN: Tilde.run – Agent sandbox with a transactional, versioned filesystem
item.description: Show HN: Tilde.run – Agent sandbox with a transactional, versioned filesystem

item.title: [Simon Willison] Live blog: Code w/ Claude 2026
item.description: Live blog: Code w/ Claude 2026

item.title: [Hacker News] Vibe coding and agentic engineering are getting closer than I'd like
item.description: Vibe coding and agentic engineering are getting closer than I'd like

item.title: [Simon Willison] Vibe coding and agentic engineering are getting closer than I'd like
item.description: Vibe coding and agentic engineering are getting closer than I'd like

item.title: [GitHub Trending] addyosmani/agent-skills — Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
item.description: addyosmani/agent-skills offers production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/InsForge — InsForge is a Postgres-based backend with auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway. Built for coding agents.
item.description: InsForge is a Postgres-based backend providing authentication, storage, compute, hosting, and an AI gateway for coding agents.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] cheahjs/free-llm-api-resources — A list of free LLM inference resources accessible via API.
item.description: Repository curates free LLM inference resources accessible via API.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] bytedance/deer-flow — An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
item.description: ByteDance released deer-flow, an open-source SuperAgent framework for long-horizon tasks spanning research, coding, and creation.

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] Silicon Valley gets Serious about Services
item.description: [AINews] Silicon Valley gets Serious about Services

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] StateSMix: Online Lossless Compression via Mamba State Space Models and Sparse N-gram Context Mixing
item.description: StateSMix, a self-trained lossless compressor combining Mamba state-space models with sparse n-gram mixing, achieves better compression than xz.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] eOptShrinkQ: Near-Lossless KV Cache Compression Through Optimal Spectral Denoising and Quantization
item.description: eOptShrinkQ compresses KV cache in transformers through spectral denoising and quantization, achieving near-lossless compression with one bit savings per entry.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] An End-to-End Framework for Building Large Language Models for Software Operations
item.description: OpsLLM is a domain-specific LLM for software operations that performs knowledge-based QA and root cause analysis, outperforming existing models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] On the Invariants of Softmax Attention
item.description: Research identifies structural invariants in softmax attention mechanisms across language models, including zero-sum constraints and spectral properties.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Delay, Plateau, or Collapse: Evaluating the Impact of Systematic Verification Error on RLVR
item.description: Systematic verification errors in reinforcement learning can cause performance collapse or plateaus, with outcomes determined by error patterns rather than overall error rate.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Agentic AI-Based Joint Computing and Networking via Mixture of Experts and Large Language Models
item.description: Framework uses LLM as semantic gate to select and orchestrate mixture-of-experts for dynamic 6G network optimization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Generate, Filter, Control, Replay: A Comprehensive Survey of Rollout Strategies for LLM Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Survey of rollout strategies for LLM reinforcement learning introduces GFCR framework decomposing pipelines into four stages with trade-off criteria.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When Safety Geometry Collapses: Fine-Tuning Vulnerabilities in Agentic Guard Models
item.description: Safety guard models lose alignment during benign fine-tuning due to collapsed latent safety geometry; Fisher-weighted regularization restores refusal capabilities.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Synthesis to Clinical Assistance: A Strategy-Aware Agent Framework for Autism Intervention based on Real Clinical Dataset
item.description: AI framework for autism intervention generates synthetic data and achieves 80% consistency with expert strategies using explicit ABA procedures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PRISM-CTG: A Foundation Model for Cardiotocography Analysis with Multi-View SSL
item.description: PRISM-CTG is a self-supervised foundation model for cardiotocography analysis trained on unlabeled clinical recordings to improve fetal monitoring prediction tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Mitigating the reconstruction-detection trade-off in VAE-based unsupervised anomaly detection
item.description: Study reveals trade-off between reconstruction and anomaly detection in VAE models, proposing Sparse VAE as effective mitigation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Heterogeneous Graph Importance Scoring and Clustering with Automated LLM-based Interpretation
item.description: Researchers use heterogeneous graph analysis and LLMs to assess and rank bridge importance across urban infrastructure networks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DeRelayL: Sustainable Decentralized Relay Learning
item.description: Researchers propose DeRelayL, a decentralized relay learning system enabling permissionless participants to collaboratively train and share machine learning models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Proteo-R1: Reasoning Foundation Models for De Novo Protein Design
item.description: Proteo-R1 combines language models and diffusion for protein design by separating reasoning about functional residues from geometric generation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PAMNet: Cycle-aware Phase-Amplitude Modulation Network for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting
item.description: PAMNet decomposes periodic patterns into phase and amplitude components for multivariate time series forecasting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Static Analysis to Audience Dissemination: A Training-Free Multimodal Controversy Detection Multi-Agent Framework
item.description: AuDisAgent, a training-free multi-agent framework, detects controversial video content by modeling diverse audience perspectives during dissemination.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PrismAgent: Illuminating Harm in Memes via a Zero-Shot Interpretable Multi-Agent Framework
item.description: PrismAgent, a zero-shot multi-agent framework, detects harmful memes using interpretable four-stage reasoning without requiring large annotated datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Framework for Exploring and Disentangling Intersectional Bias: A Case Study in Fetal Ultrasound
item.description: Study proposes framework for detecting intersectional bias in fetal ultrasound AI, identifying image quality factors as key performance disparity drivers.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Healthcare AI GYM for Medical Agents
item.description: Comprehensive medical training environment with 3.6K tasks reveals agent training instability and proposes Turn-level Truncated On-Policy Distillation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Exploring Pass-Rate Reward in Reinforcement Learning for Code Generation
item.description: Study shows pass-rate rewards don't improve RL-based code generation performance over binary rewards, due to miscalibration of partial-pass solutions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] RouteHijack: Routing-Aware Attack on Mixture-of-Experts LLMs
item.description: RouteHijack is a jailbreak attack that manipulates expert routing in MoE LLMs to bypass safety alignment, achieving 69.3% success across seven models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Predicting Euler Characteristics and Constructing Topological Structure Using Machine Learning Techniques
item.description: Machine learning method predicts Euler characteristics from single images by learning to construct spin configurations without requiring large datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AsymK-Talker: Real-Time and Long-Horizon Talking Head Generation via Asymmetric Kernel Distillation
item.description: AsymK-Talker enables real-time, long-horizon audio-driven talking head generation via kernel-conditioned diffusion distillation with improved lip synchronization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Disease Is a Spectral Perturbation
item.description: Method models disease as spectral perturbations of biomarker covariance matrices, providing mechanistic explanations and improved disease prognosis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Kernel Affine Hull Machines for Compute-Efficient Query-Side Semantic Encoding
item.description: Kernel Affine Hull Machines replace neural query encoding with lightweight analytical estimators, achieving 8.5x latency reduction in semantic retrieval tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Calibration of the underlying surface parameters for urban flood using latent variables and adjoint equation
item.description: Bayesian parameter calibration using latent variables and adjoint equations improves urban flood simulation accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ZeRO-Prefill: Zero Redundancy Overheads in MoE Prefill Serving
item.description: ZeRO-Prefill improves MoE LLM prefill-only serving by replacing synchronous expert routing with asynchronous weight gathering, achieving 1.35-1.37x throughput over baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Analytic Bridge Diffusions for Controlled Path Generation
item.description: Researchers present an analytically solvable bridge diffusion method using LQG control theory that achieves path generation without neural networks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ISAAC: Auditing Causal Reasoning in Deep Models for Drug-Target Interaction
item.description: ISAAC framework reveals drug-target interaction models can achieve accuracy through spurious features masked by standard metrics.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reward Hacking Benchmark: Measuring Exploits in LLM Agents with Tool Use
item.description: Reward Hacking Benchmark tests 13 LLM models for task-shortcut exploitation; exploit rates range from 0% (Claude Sonnet 4.5) to 13.9% (DeepSeek-R1-Zero).

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Focus on the Core: Empowering Diffusion Large Language Models by Self-Contrast
item.description: FoCore is a training-free decoding strategy for diffusion language models that leverages high-information-density tokens to improve generation quality and efficiency.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MTA: Multi-Granular Trajectory Alignment for Large Language Model Distillation
item.description: MTA framework aligns teacher-student LLM representations across layers using word-level and phrase-level granularities to improve knowledge distillation performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A framework for analyzing concept representations in neural models
item.description: Unified framework analyzes concept representations in neural models via containment and disentanglement testing on text and speech models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MemORAI: Memory Organization and Retrieval via Adaptive Graph Intelligence for LLM Conversational Agents
item.description: MemORAI framework enables LLMs to maintain persistent personalized memory through selective filtering, provenance tracking, and query-adaptive graph retrieval, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Verbal-R3: Verbal Reranker as the Missing Bridge between Retrieval and Reasoning
item.description: Verbal-R3 introduces an agentic RAG framework using Verbal Annotations to bridge retrieval results with LLM reasoning, achieving state-of-the-art performance on complex question answering.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Injecting Distributional Awareness into MLLMs via Reinforcement Learning for Deep Imbalanced Regression
item.description: Distribution-aware reinforcement learning improves multimodal language models' numerical regression performance on long-tailed data distributions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Medmarks: A Comprehensive Open-Source LLM Benchmark Suite for Medical Tasks
item.description: Medmarks presents an open-source medical LLM benchmark suite evaluating 61 models across 30 tasks, showing frontier models outperform open-weight alternatives.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Hallucinations Undermine Trust; Metacognition is a Way Forward
item.description: Models hallucinate due to poor awareness of knowledge boundaries; researchers propose expressing uncertainty as metacognition to mitigate confident errors.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Artificial intelligence language technologies in multilingual healthcare: Grand challenges ahead
item.description: AI language technologies in multilingual healthcare face challenges in safety, equity, and reliability across languages, requiring interdisciplinary collaboration for deployment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Auditing demographic bias in AI-based emergency police dispatch: a cross-lingual evaluation of eleven large language models
item.description: Audit of 11 LLMs in emergency police dispatch reveals systematic demographic bias, especially in ambiguous scenarios, with cross-lingual variations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ReMedi: Reasoner for Medical Clinical Prediction
item.description: ReMedi framework improves clinical outcome prediction from EHR using LLMs with rationale-answer pairs, achieving 19.9% F1 score gains over baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FT-RAG: A Fine-grained Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework for Complex Table Reasoning
item.description: FT-RAG improves retrieval-augmented generation for table reasoning through fine-grained semantic decomposition and graph-based retrieval.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The grip of grammar on meaning uncertainty: cross-linguistic evidence, neural correlates, and clinical relevance
item.description: Grammar reduces meaning uncertainty across languages, with corresponding brain activity patterns disrupted in aphasia and schizophrenia.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Automated Interpretability and Feature Discovery in Language Models with Agents
item.description: Researchers present an autonomous multiagent framework for mechanistic interpretability that automates discovery and explanation of internal features in large language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Fine-Tuning Pre-Trained Code Models for AI-Generated Code Detection
item.description: Fine-tuned code models achieve macro-F1 scores of 0.737 and 0.422 for detecting and attributing AI-generated code in SemEval-2026 Task 13.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Where Do Prompt Perturbations Break Generation? A Segment-Level View of Robustness in LoRA-Tuned Language Models
item.description: S²R² framework improves LoRA-tuned language model robustness by enforcing semantic segment-level consistency under prompt perturbations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Prosa: Rubric-Based Evaluation of LLMs on Real User Chats in Brazilian Portuguese
item.description: Multi-judge rubric scoring achieves better LLM evaluation consistency than holistic judging, demonstrated on new Prosa Brazilian Portuguese benchmark.
